comment.body:
Hi, you can disable AG at all `kaiserpermanente.org` (sub)domains by putting

```
kaiserpermanente.org
*.kaiserpermanente.org
```

in the "Allowlist" section of AG's settings page: https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-browser-extension/features/other-features/

issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard for Safari

### AdGuard version

4.5.18

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Missed ads or ad leftovers, AdGuard gets detected on a website

### Which browser(s) do you use?

Safari

### Which device do you use?

Mobile

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://wearychef.com/cranberry-syrup-recipe-for-holidays-and-all-year/

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter, AdGuard Mobile Ads filter

### Privacy

AdGuard URL Tracking filter

### Social Widgets

_No response_

### Annoyances

AdGuard Annoyances filter

### Security

_No response_

### Other

Filter unblocking search ads and self-promotion

### DNS filters

AdGuard DNS filter

### Language-specific

_No response_

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

1. AdGuard for iOS (free) gets detected by AdThrive/Raptive's anti‑adblock, triggering it to load AS.


### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [https://www.oregonlive.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.oregonlive.com%2F) ### Comment > All pages on oregonlive.com domain are covered by a full-screen notice to disable ad blocking, with no option to ignore. issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://apps.apple.com/us/app/gmail-email-by-google/id422689480](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fapps.apple.com%2Fus%2Fapp%2Fgmail-email-by-google%2Fid422689480) ### Comment > Une bannière publicitaire s’affiche en bas de l’écran pour les onglets "Promotions" et "Réseaux Sociaux" dans l’application iOS "Gmail" de Google. Cette publicité existe depuis longtemps sur la version Web et est bien bloquée via l’extension AdGuard de Chrome. Il y a eu un récent changement de l’affichage publicitaire sur l’application iOS depuis quelques semaines. La publicité s’affichait en haut et était correctement bloquée. Depuis que celle-ci s’affiche en bas, elle n’est plus bloquée. ``` Username: @Kris027 ``` ### Screenshots

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.title: I have collected some dangerous websites and hope that you will block these dangerous websites.
issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] I checked the documentation and found no answer;
- [x] I checked to make sure that this issue has not already been filed;
- [x] This is not an ad/bug report.

### Problem description

我收集了一些危险网站，adguard的钓鱼网站数据库目前没有包含这些网站，所以在此提交给你们。下面的网站都不是正版的软件官方网站，但是都自称是官方正版，里面的软件具有病毒。下面网站域名包含了“google”和“chrome”，其实就是伪装成谷歌的chrome浏览器下载网站。
`chrome-hl.hl.cn`
`cnzh-google-apps.hl.cn`
`zh-googlle-chrome.hl.cn`
`360cncn.com`
`wps-cnzh.com`
`360edge.cn`
`app-google-zh.hl.cn`
`zhcn-googele.hl.cn`
`baiduwangpan.cc`
`google-chrrome-zh.hl.cn`

### Proposed solution

封禁这些网站

### Additional information

_No response_

comment.body:
Известно, что эта проблема решается с помощью AdGuard Extra.

Если вы пользуетесь AdGuard на устройствах Windows, Mac или Android, пожалуйста, убедитесь, что AdGuard Extra включена в настройках приложения.

Если вы используете расширение AdGuard для браузера, рекомендуется также установить AdGuard Extra.

* [Установка на браузеры Chrome, Edge или другие, основанные на Chromium](https://agrd.io/adguard_extra_chrome_release)
* [Установка на Firefox](https://agrd.io/adguard_extra_firefox_release)

Cette publicité existe depuis longtemps sur la version Web et est bien bloquée via l’extension AdGuard de Chrome. Il y a eu un récent changement de l’affichage publicitaire sur l’application iOS depuis quelques semaines. La publicité s’affichait en haut et était correctement bloquée. Depuis que celle-ci s’affiche en bas, elle n’est plus bloquée. ``` Username: @Kris027 ``` ### Screenshots

pinned_comment.body:
Adguard 브라우저 확장 프로그램 MV3을 사용하시고 숲 광고 차단이 안되는 분들께:
해당 이슈는 최근 변경 사항 ( https://github.com/List-KR/List-KR/commit/29e530df948a1054fba818a1917992c80c3b2d04 )이 Adguard 브라우저 확장 MV3에 아직 적용되지 않아서 발생한 현상입니다.
따라서, Adguard 브라우저 확장 MV3를 사용하시는 분들은 아래 방법을 따라주시기 바랍니다:
 1. 각 브라우저의 웹 확장 프로그램 관리 페이지에 들어갑니다. (예: `chrome://extensions/`)
 2. Adguard 브라우저 확장 프로그램의 디테일 버튼을 선택합니다.
 3. 사용자 스크립트 권한을 부여합니다.
 4. 브라우저 툴바에 있는 Adguard 브라우저 확장 프로그램을 클릭하고 필터 리스트 업데이트 버튼을 누릅니다.
 5. 숲 웹 페이지를 새로고침합니다.
 6. 그럼에도 해결되지 않으면 다음 정식 Adguard 브라우저 확장 MV3의 릴리즈 시기까지 기다리시고 확장 프로그램 자체를 업데이트하셔야 합니다.

이러한 번거러움은 Google의 정책에서 비롯되었습니다.

pinned_comment.body:
Adguard 브라우저 확장 프로그램 MV3을 사용하시고 숲 광고 차단이 안되는 분들께:
해당 이슈는 최근 변경 사항 ( https://github.com/List-KR/List-KR/commit/29e530df948a1054fba818a1917992c80c3b2d04 )이 Adguard 브라우저 확장 MV3에 아직 적용되지 않아서 발생한 현상입니다.
따라서, Adguard 브라우저 확장 MV3를 사용하시는 분들은 아래 방법을 따라주시기 바랍니다:
 1. 각 브라우저의 웹 확장 프로그램 관리 페이지에 들어갑니다. (예: `chrome://extensions/`)
 2. Adguard 브라우저 확장 프로그램의 디테일 버튼을 선택합니다.
 3. 사용자 스크립트 권한을 부여합니다.
 4. 브라우저 툴바에 있는 Adguard 브라우저 확장 프로그램을 클릭하고 필터 리스트 업데이트 버튼을 누릅니다.
 5. 숲 웹 페이지를 새로고침합니다.
 6. 그럼에도 해결되지 않으면 다음 정식 Adguard 브라우저 확장 MV3의 릴리즈 시기까지 기다리시고 확장 프로그램 자체를 업데이트하셔야 합니다.

이러한 번거러움은 Google의 정책에서 비롯되었습니다.

issue.title: gemini.google.com

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body: ### Prerequisites - [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml); - [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue; - [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date; - [x] Browser version is up-to-date; - [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue. ### What product do you use? AdGuard for Windows ### AdGuard version 7.22.5 (5262) (CL 1.20.92, DL 2.7.6 ) ### What type of problem have you encountered? Missed ads or ad leftovers ### Which browser(s) do you use? Chrome ### Which device do you use? Desktop ### Where is the problem encountered? gemini.google.com/app ### Ad Blocking AdGuard Base filter ### Privacy AdGuard URL Tracking filter ### Social Widgets AdGuard Social Media filter ### Annoyances AdGuard Annoyances filter, AdGuard Cookie Notices filter, AdGuard Popups filter, AdGuard Other Annoyances filter, AdGuard Mobile App Banners filter, AdGuard Widgets filter, Adblock Warning Removal List, Fanboy's Annoyances, EasyList Cookie List ### Security _No response_ ### Other _No response_ ### DNS filters _No response_ ### Language-specific _No response_ ### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled? _No response_ ### Add your comment and screenshots In the chat with Gemini (on the official website), some accounts (apparently the subscription administrator account) are displaying an offer to upgrade to a more expensive subscription plan. The offer was spotted in the model selection menu and in the sidebar (when expanded). First issue can be resolved by the `gemini.google.com##.upgrade-container` rule. On the first sight, second does not have any unique characteristics. ### Privacy - [x] I agree to follow this condition

comment.body:
@Alex-302 Furthermore, the element was previously blocked by:

```
gemini.google.com##upsell-button
```

Which is now obsolete.

Она работает нормально. Это зависит от фильтров или других модулей? Попробуйте оставить только фильтры Адгард, обновить их, перезапустить приложение.

issue.title: www.youtube.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: T: Social Widget
labels.description: Social widgets, share, like buttons and popups

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check); 
[^3]: On macOS, <kbd>Command</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd>
[^4]: Task Manager on Windows, System Monitor on GNOME Shell, KDE System Guard on KDE Plasma or Activity Monitor on macOS. 


Previous issue https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/198973

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.al.com/news/huntsville/2026/03/artemis-ii-watch-party-us-space-rocket-center-hosts-launch-party.html?fbclid=IwdGRjcAQ5V2ZjbGNrBDlXQGV4dG4DYWVtAjExAHNydGMGYXBwX2lkDDM1MDY4NTUzMTcyOAABHh5Ef_WRYtcU6P_kYUSk3regCxnULulBqg5KVCxVfvbVFVpQ4GYaB4qWCQgE_aem_0YOnQeKQ1Xx8zdpLPvbuLw](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.al.com%2Fnews%2Fhuntsville%2F2026%2F03%2Fartemis-ii-watch-party-us-space-rocket-center-hosts-launch-party.html%3Ffbclid%3DIwdGRjcAQ5V2ZjbGNrBDlXQGV4dG4DYWVtAjExAHNydGMGYXBwX2lkDDM1MDY4NTUzMTcyOAABHh5Ef_WRYtcU6P_kYUSk3regCxnULulBqg5KVCxVfvbVFVpQ4GYaB4qWCQgE_aem_0YOnQeKQ1Xx8zdpLPvbuLw) ### Comment > On the Facebook android app, I have links open in the app instead of an external browser. All al.com links opened in FB detect adguard and I get the pop up telling me to disable it. This is new and only started about a month ago. Prior to this, I had no problem opening the links in FB with adguard enabled. > > You recently fixed a similar issue with al.com links not opening in the browser when adguard was enabled. If I direct fb to open the link externally, it will open without a problem. ### Screenshots

issue.body:
### Prerequisites - [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml); - [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue; - [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date; - [x] Browser version is up-to-date; - [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue. ### What product do you use? AdGuard for Android ### AdGuard version 4.12.1 ### What type of problem have you encountered? Missed analytics or tracker ### Which browser(s) do you use? the problem is with app, not a site ### Which device do you use? Mobile ### Where is the problem encountered? https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.teslacoilsw.launcher ### Ad Blocking AdGuard Base filter, AdGuard Mobile Ads filter ### Privacy AdGuard Tracking Protection filter ### Social Widgets _No response_ ### Annoyances _No response_ ### Security Online Malicious URL Blocklist, uBlock Origin – Badware risks ### Other _No response_ ### DNS filters _No response_ ### Language-specific Dandelion Sprout's Nordic Filters ### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled? _No response_ ### Add your comment and screenshots 1. It'd be an understatement to say that Nova Launcher got stuffed full of trackers after it changed ownership last autumn. All but one I can see are covered in AdGuard DNS Filter, but the remaining one understandably isn't, and as such I propose for AdGuard Tracking Protection Filter: `://web.facebook.com^$app=com.teslacoilsw.launcher` 2. Screenshots Note that the red mark around the Nova Launcher row is because I added the entry to "My Filters" during testing for this issue report, while the `0.0.0.0` part is because I ran a test for it on my AdGuard Home server.
Screenshot 1:
### Privacy - [x] I agree to follow this condition

issue.body:
### Prerequisites - [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml); - [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue; - [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date; - [x] Browser version is up-to-date; - [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue. ### What product do you use? AdGuard for Android ### AdGuard version 4.12.1 ### What type of problem have you encountered? Missed analytics or tracker ### Which browser(s) do you use? the problem is with app, not a site ### Which device do you use? Mobile ### Where is the problem encountered? https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.teslacoilsw.launcher ### Ad Blocking AdGuard Base filter, AdGuard Mobile Ads filter ### Privacy AdGuard Tracking Protection filter ### Social Widgets _No response_ ### Annoyances _No response_ ### Security Online Malicious URL Blocklist, uBlock Origin – Badware risks ### Other _No response_ ### DNS filters _No response_ ### Language-specific Dandelion Sprout's Nordic Filters ### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled? _No response_ ### Add your comment and screenshots 1. It'd be an understatement to say that Nova Launcher got stuffed full of trackers after it changed ownership last autumn. All but one I can see are covered in AdGuard DNS Filter, but the remaining one understandably isn't, and as such I propose for AdGuard Tracking Protection Filter: `://web.facebook.com^$app=com.teslacoilsw.launcher` 2. Screenshots Note that the red mark around the Nova Launcher row is because I added the entry to "My Filters" during testing for this issue report, while the `0.0.0.0` part is because I ran a test for it on my AdGuard Home server.
Screenshot 1:
### Privacy - [x] I agree to follow this condition

issue.title: wetransfer.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
